# Raino Studio — Agentic PCB Design Platform

> Raino Studio is the product application for Raino. It requires authentication (Supabase magic link). Authenticated users can create projects and run the full hardware design workflow.

## Public Routes

- [/login](https://raino-studio.vercel.app/login) — Magic link sign-in
- [/signup](https://raino-studio.vercel.app/signup) — Account creation

## Authenticated Routes (require sign-in)

- [/ (Dashboard)](https://raino-studio.vercel.app/) — Project list and management
- [/projects/new](https://raino-studio.vercel.app/projects/new) — Create new project
- [/projects/{id}](https://raino-studio.vercel.app/projects/{id}) — Project detail with workflow

## API Routes (require auth + ownership)

All project API routes enforce ownership via verifyProjectOwnership. Unauthenticated requests get 401, unauthorized get 404.

## Workflow Steps

1. Intake — Natural language description
2. Clarification — Clarifying questions
3. Spec compilation — Structured specification
4. Architecture — Template selection
5. Ingestion — Document ingestion
6. BOM generation — Bill of materials
7. Quote generation — Rough quotes with honest labeling
8. Design generation — KiCad project creation
9. Preview/download — Artifacts
10. Handoff — Manufacturing handoff

## Marketing Site

- [raino-site.vercel.app](https://raino-site.vercel.app/) — Public-facing documentation and product info
